name: Form of Tender
asks: Formal tender offer details and signing.
luke: Can help organise wording and check completeness.
evidence: Authorised signer, legal entity details, final offer package.
nonConforming: Unsigned, incomplete or inconsistent offer details.

name: Compliance and Declarations
asks: Statement of compliance, non-compliance and declarations.
luke: Can help track exceptions and plain-English notes.
evidence: Reviewed tender conditions and specialist/legal input if needed.
nonConforming: Unclear exceptions, missing declarations or unsupported compliance claims.

name: Social Responsibility
luke: Can draft local/community benefit language for review.
evidence: Practical local benefit commitments VFG can actually deliver.

name: Insurance
evidence: Certificates of currency and required policy details.

name: Licences / Certificates
evidence: Licences, accreditations, RPEQ or consultant evidence where required.
nonConforming: Missing required qualifications or unverified specialist claims.

name: Subcontractors / Subconsultants
evidence: Names, scopes, capability evidence, insurance/licence info.
nonConforming: Unclear critical roles or missing specialist pathway.

name: Local Business and Benefit
evidence: Actual local suppliers, spend categories and community benefit commitments.

name: Tendered Sum and BOQ
asks: Tendered sum and bill of quantities.
luke: Can help cross-reference structure, not price.
evidence: Final rates, lump sum, BOQ checks, exclusions and assumptions.
nonConforming: Arithmetic errors, missing BOQ items, public leakage of pricing.

name: Proposed Concept Design
luke: Can translate VFG design intent into tender-friendly narrative and concept drawings labelled correctly.
evidence: VFG sketches, repair method, progression feature intent, signage/fencing notes.

name: Experience and Operational Capability
asks: Company and project team experience worth 30 percent.
luke: Can format capability mapping and case-study prompts.
evidence: Project examples, referees, team CVs and relevant delivery history.
nonConforming: Unsupported experience claims or missing referees.

name: Program / Methodology / Cashflow
asks: Works program, methodology and anticipated cashflow worth 15 percent.
luke: Can structure the written methodology from VFG inputs.
evidence: Construction sequence, access, hold points, program, resources and cashflow.
nonConforming: Unrealistic program or non-specialist methodology claims.

name: QMS / WHSMP / SSEMP
asks: Accreditation systems and management plans. Mandatory.
luke: Can track plan names and required attachments.
evidence: Quality, safety and environmental systems and project-specific plans.
nonConforming: Missing mandatory management systems or plans.
